about-desc: We don't just offer lessons; we craft a complete spiritual experience for non-Arabic speakers. At Sadid, we blend the authenticity of Islamic heritage with modern educational technologies to guide you on a sacred journey starting from pronunciation to understanding meanings and feeling the sweetness of the Quran.
about-benefit-1-desc: An educational path carefully designed to suit your level, taking you step-by-step from basics to mastery.
about-benefit-2-desc: Learn from a select group of scholars and educators specialized in teaching non-Arabic speakers.
about-benefit-3-desc: Accredited certificates crowning your efforts and witnessing your scientific advancement.
video-alt: Your browser does not support video playback
about-point-1: A progressive curriculum that takes you from the basics to mastery, regardless of your level.
about-point-2: Specialized teachers combining knowledge and expertise in teaching non-native speakers.
about-point-3: Live classes and interactive materials for an engaging learning experience.
about-point-4: Accredited certificates that reflect your achievements and document your progress.
journey_subtitle: Simple and measured steps separate you from mastery
journey_step1_desc: Accurate assessment of your current level to set the right starting point.
journey_step2_desc: An educational path tailored to your time and goals to ensure continuity.
journey_step3_desc: Live lessons with specialized teachers in an environment that encourages participation.
journey_step4_desc: Crowning your journey with tests and an accredited certificate documenting your achievement.
field_quran_desc: An integrated methodology combining mastery of memorization with deep understanding, supervised by certified reciters.
field_arabic_desc: Interactive programs that take you from the first letters to fluency in speaking and understanding texts.
field_islamic_desc: Solid scientific foundation in Creed, Fiqh, and Seerah, to build a conscious Muslim personality.
blog-desc: A serene space where we dive deep into meanings, extracting pearls of understanding and quenching the soul's thirst from the pure spring of knowledge.
contact_desc_new: Whether you have an inquiry about the courses, or you want an educational consultation, our team is ready to serve you with love and care.
footer_desc: A leading educational beacon aiming to spread Quranic sciences and Arabic language for non-native speakers.
enroll_subtitle: Fill in the following details and the Sadid Academy team will contact you shortly.
enroll_notes_placeholder: Tell us about your current level or any special request...
whatsapp-msg: Peace be upon you. I would like to inquire about Sadid Academy programs.
wa-template: Hello, I would like to enroll in the [COURSE] course.
giftText: First trial lecture 100% free... Start your journey now!
error_email: Please enter a valid email address.
contact_error: ❌ An error occurred, please try again.
page-hero-subtitle: Clear methodology, elite teachers, and modern techniques ensuring a unique and enjoyable learning experience from anywhere.
promo-text: First lecture trial & 100% free — Start your journey now!
try-first: Try the first lecture for free, no commitment!
first-topics: In the first lecture, you will learn about the course goals, plan, and step-by-step learning method.
promo-desc: Sadid Academy offers distinguished courses in Quran, Arabic Language, and Islamic Studies, designed to fit your schedule and meet your academic ambitions.
contact_success: Message sent successfully! We will contact you soon.
courses_hero_badge: The journey of knowledge begins here
courses_hero_desc: Clear methodology, elite teachers, and modern technologies ensuring a unique and enjoyable learning experience.
courses_quote_text: { Only those fear Allah, from among His servants, who have knowledge }
courses_quote_sub: Knowledge inherits fear, and fear inherits the love of Allah
courses_list_desc: Choose the path that suits you and start learning now
courses_header_desc: Choose the path that suits your ambition, and start a unique learning journey combining authentic knowledge and modern methods.
quran_hero_desc: Master the recitation of the Book of Allah theoretically and practically, with direct correction of articulation points and characteristics by elite proficient reciters, in a spiritual journey that elevates your soul.
quran_content_title: What will you master in this program?
quran_content_desc: A comprehensive methodology covering theoretical, practical, and spiritual aspects of your journey with the Quran.
quran_item_correction_desc: Adjusting articulation points and characteristics with extreme precision, eliminating obvious and hidden mistakes, to reach a sweet, correct recitation with connected Sanad.
quran_item_tajweed_desc: Moving from memorizing theoretical rules to spontaneous, correct application of Noon, Meem, Madd, stopping, and starting rules during reading.
quran_item_memorization_desc: Learn modern mental strategies to solidify memorization, and periodic review plans ensuring the Quran remains firmly in your heart.
quran_item_fiqh_desc: We don't just adjust the tongue, we elevate to adjust the heart, learning how to contemplate verses and feel Allah's messages in them.
quran_curriculum_desc: We believe every student is a unique case, so we designed a flexible curriculum that shapes itself according to your needs.
quran_assessment_title: Curriculum built after assessing your level
quran_assessment_desc: We don't follow one mold for everyone. Your journey begins with a direct meeting with the teacher to determine your level accurately (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced), and based on the assessment, a plan is set to ensure your fastest progress.
quran_modules_title: Educational modules we choose from for you
quran_module_foundation_desc: Studying Noorani or Baghdadi Qaida to adjust pronunciation from the start.
quran_module_correction_desc: Intensive focus on articulation points and characteristics to eliminate mistakes.
quran_module_review_desc: Flexible plans for new memorization with a strict system for reviewing and solidifying what's memorized.
quran_module_ijaza_desc: For proficient learners wishing to obtain an Ijaza with a connected chain of transmission to the Prophet ﷺ.
quran_note_part1: These modules are combined in varying proportions to form
quran_note_part2: that serves your goal in the best way.
quran_feature_oneonone_desc: The teacher is dedicated to you alone throughout the class time.
quran_feature_interactive_desc: Immediate correction of articulation and screen sharing.
pricing_section_title: Choose the plan that suits you
pricing_section_desc: Thoughtful prices suitable for everyone, ensuring quality and flexibility in scheduling.
pricing_plan_starter_subtitle: A successful start to a great journey
pricing_plan_commitment_subtitle: The perfect choice for continuous progress
pricing_plan_mastery_subtitle: For the diligent aiming for completion
arabic_hero_desc: Embark on a journey to learn Arabic from the first letters to fluency, with an interactive methodology focusing on conversation and deep understanding of Islamic culture.
arabic_content_title: What will you master in this program?
arabic_content_desc: Comprehensive development of the four language skills: Listening, Speaking, Reading, and Writing.
arabic_item_speaking_desc: Break the fear barrier and speak confidently in daily life situations and discuss various topics.
arabic_item_reading_desc: Reading and understanding Arabic texts, starting from simple sentences to literary and media texts.
arabic_item_writing_desc: Learn spelling rules and correct written expression to articulate your ideas clearly.
arabic_item_grammar_desc: Study functional rules that discipline your tongue and pen, away from dry theoretical complexities.
arabic_curriculum_desc: We rely on trusted global educational series (like Al-Arabiyah Bayna Yadayk) with special additions from the Academy.
arabic_assessment_desc: We start with a placement test to place you in the appropriate stage (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced) to ensure maximum benefit.
arabic_module_foundation_desc: For absolute beginners: Learn letters, correct pronunciation, and basic words.
arabic_module_conversation_desc: Focus on oral skills for effective communication in daily life.
arabic_module_grammar_desc: For intermediate and advanced levels: Adjusting linguistic performance and understanding sentence structures.
arabic_module_media_desc: Study media, political, or Islamic texts according to the student's desire.
islamic_hero_desc: A facilitated scientific journey to study the fundamentals and branches of religion, from Creed and Jurisprudence to Biography and Hadith, to build a balanced Muslim personality.
islamic_content_desc: A comprehensive methodology covering the most important chapters of Islamic knowledge obligatory for every Muslim.
islamic_item_aqidah_desc: Understanding the pillars of faith and correcting beliefs to strengthen certainty in Allah.
islamic_item_fiqh_desc: Learn how to worship Allah with insight (Prayer, Fasting, Zakat) according to recognized schools.
islamic_item_seerah_desc: Studying the life of the Prophet ﷺ to derive lessons and follow his example.
islamic_item_hadith_desc: Explanation of the Forty Nawawi and comprehensive words to understand the Prophet's guidance.
islamic_curriculum_desc: We rely on simplified scientific texts suitable for non-specialists and non-Arabic speakers.
islamic_assessment_desc: The student starts with foundational levels and then ascends to advanced levels based on comprehension.
islamic_module_aqidah_desc: Study of the six pillars of faith.
islamic_module_fiqh_desc: Rulings of purification, prayer, and fasting.
islamic_module_seerah_desc: Events of the Meccan and Medinan periods.
islamic_module_hadith_desc: Explanation of selected hadiths on ethics and rulings.

blogData.title: A Journey to the Heart of the Qur’an... Start Today
blogData.desc: With every verse you memorize, light blossoms in your heart, your faith deepens, and you draw closer to the true meaning of life.
blogData.longContent:
There are journeys that change the course of life, but none is deeper or truer than the one leading you to the heart of the Holy Qur’an. It is the Book of Allah, whose wonders never cease, whose scholars never tire, and whose recitation never wearies the believers.

The Qur’an is not just words to be recited; it is a pulse flowing through your soul, calming your heart in moments of confusion, and lighting your path in the darkness of this world. Every verse carries a personal message for you, and every chapter weaves a new meaning for life.

At Sadid Academy, we guide you step by step, from the first letter to the highest level of mastery. You will learn the correct recitation, taste the beauty of its meanings, and feel the closeness to Allah with every lesson. Our lessons are interactive, our teachers are experts, and our plans are tailored to your time and level, wherever you are.

Do not delay your journey with the Qur’an, for every day you spend away from it is a day lost from peace and light. Make today the beginning of a new covenant between you and the words of Allah... Register now and let the Qur’an transform your life forever.

blogData.title: The Arabic Language... The Key to Understanding God’s Words
blogData.desc: When you master the language of the Qur’an, the treasures of meaning open before you, and the veil between you and the light of revelation is lifted.
blogData.longContent:
The Arabic language is not just a means of communication; it is the vessel of revelation, the tongue of the Qur’an, and the key to truly understanding the words of Allah. Every letter has its resonance, and every word carries precision of meaning and beauty of expression.

When you master Arabic, you will not merely read the texts—you will live them, realizing depths you never saw before. You will taste its rhetorical miracles and feel the hidden beauty that lights your heart and nourishes your mind.

At Sadid Academy, we offer a gradual curriculum that combines clarity of explanation with beauty of style, taking you from your first letters to fluency, from basic grammar to expressive eloquence.

Do not let the language of the Qur’an remain distant from you. Come closer, and give yourself the chance to truly understand God’s words... Enroll today and begin your journey.

blogData.title: Sacred Knowledge... Light and Guidance in Times of Trial
blogData.desc: Through knowledge, you see truth from falsehood, and you live a life of peace and steadfastness on the straight path.
blogData.longContent:
In times when trials are many and voices are countless, nothing protects your heart and steadies your steps like sacred knowledge. It is the light that reveals the path of truth, the compass that directs your life towards Allah’s pleasure.

Knowledge is not just memorizing issues, but deep understanding, sharp insight, and wisdom in dealing with every situation. It is your provision for life’s journey, and your shield against doubts and temptations.

At Sadid Academy, we offer a structured study of fiqh, aqeedah, and seerah, in an accessible style for all levels, so you can be clear-sighted in your religion and live with peace no matter how the world changes around you.

Start today. Do not let your heart be without light or your life without guidance... Join us now and let knowledge be your lifelong companion.
